subcodes.first_line: O fair-minded souls! Ye are those of whom it is said: "They fear not the reproach of any reproacher in the Cause of God." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس منصفه شما کسانی هستید که لاتاخذهم فی الله لومه لائم در حقشان فرموده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for parents, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement
